news.summary: Starlight U.S. Residential Fund reported its Q1-2025 financial results, noting an increase in normalized same property net operating income of 2.5% compared to Q1-2024. Revenue from property operations was $9,798 (down 1.3% from Q1-2024), and net operating income was $6,052 (down 3.4% from Q1-2024). The Fund reported a net loss of $24,406 in Q1-2025. They completed 55 in-suite upgrades, achieving a rental premium of $93. Economic occupancy was 94.4%, and rent collection stood at 99.3% for Q1-2025. The Fund also disclosed challenges with loan extensions for certain properties like Emerson and Sunlake. They repaid a loan with proceeds from the sale of Lyric Apartments, reducing their credit facility to $2,395. Key numbers include: 6 multi-family properties, 1,973 suites, $493,716 gross book value, $472,962 indebtedness, 94.4% economic occupancy, AMR of $1,584, and an interest rate of 6.11% as of March 31, 2025. Non-IFRS metrics like FFO and AFFO were negative, impacted by accrued interest costs. The Fund aims to manage its capital structure and leverage ratio.
news.headline: Starlight U.S. Residential Fund reports Q1-2025 results - 2.5% growth in same property NOI, $24,406 net loss, 94.4% economic occupancy.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, ThreeD Capital Inc. (CSE:IDK / OTCQX:IDKFF), a venture capital firm from Canada concentrating on investments in junior resources and disruptive technologies, released its unaudited results for the three and nine months concluding on March 31, 2025.
news.headline: ThreeD Capital Inc. released Q3 and 9-month results ended March 31, 2025; a Canadian-based firm investing in junior resources & tech sectors.

news.summary: A venture capital firm based in Los Angeles, Taste Tomorrow Ventures (TTV), has recently revealed the initial closing of its first fund, TTV Fund I, totaling $30 million. This fund aims to support early-stage ventures in the beverage, food, and snack sectors. Noteworthy strategic investors, such as Ball Corporation and Advantage Solutions, are backing the fund. TTV was founded by Danny Stepper, Dino Sarti, and Scott Guthrie, who jointly possess over eighty years of experience in the industry.
news.headline: Taste Tomorrow Ventures launches $30M fund, backed by Ball Corp. and Advantage Solutions, with first investment in Just Ice Tea. Co-founded by LA Libations founders.

FORD’S NEW ELECTRIC VEHICLE BATTERY PLANT IN MARSHALL, MICHIGAN, AND ITS PLANNED 1,700 JOBS ARE AT RISK IF CONGRESS CUTS OR ELIMINATES FEDERAL TAX CREDITS SUPPORTING CLEAN ENERGY AND BATTERY MANUFACTURING.

news.summary: Volatus Aerospace Inc. reported Q1 2025 revenue of $5,713,158, with a 32% gross margin. Adjusted EBITDA improved by 30% over Q1 2024, reaching $402,004. The company generated $1,448,565 cash from operating activities and had available cash of $1,182,611 as of March 31, 2025. They also closed a $3,000,000 LIFE Offering and announced a $2,646,000 shares-for-debt transaction post-quarter. Volatus achieved total comprehensive loss of ($4,285,320) in Q1 2025. Operational highlights include partnerships for drone operations, surpassing 75,000 flight hours, and regulatory advancements. Post-quarter highlights include national expansion, defense organization collaboration, and RPAS deployments. CEO Glen Lynch emphasized strategic steps to convert sales pipeline into revenue and mentioned plans for enhanced operational efficiency. A webinar on financial results hosted by Volatus is scheduled for June 2, 2025, at 8 am ET. Full details available on Benzinga.com for more information.
news.headline: Volatus Aerospace achieved $5.7M revenue in Q1 2025, 30% EBITDA improvement, announced $3M LIFE Offering, and expanding operations.

news.summary: Starlight U.S. Multi-Family (No. 2) Core Plus Fund announced their financial results for Q1-2025. They reported revenue from property operations of $5,435 and net operating income of $3,414, which increased by 1.7% and 4.1% respectively from Q1-2024. The Fund experienced a net loss of $10,922 for Q1-2025, attributed to fair value loss on investment properties. They completed 5 upgrades at Summermill at Falls River, generating a $212 rental premium. Economic occupancy was at 94.5% for Q1-2025, with 99.3% rent collected. The Fund owns 3 multi-family properties with a total of 995 suites. Debt amounted to $260,541, with a weighted average interest rate of 6.89%. Funds from operations were ($1,720) and adjusted funds from operations were ($704). Interest coverage ratio was 0.82x. The Fund is negotiating for loan extensions for certain properties.
news.headline: Starlight U.S. Multi-Family (No. 2) Core Plus Fund sees 4.1% year-over-year NOI growth in Q1-2025, with net loss of $10,922.

news.summary: In a recent report from the National Institutes of Health, it was revealed that more than 2 million individuals in the United States are impacted by aphasia, a condition that affects language abilities. To observe Aphasia Awareness Month, the Adler Aphasia organization based in Maywood, N.J., will be organizing its yearly Gala event.
news.headline: Adler Aphasia Center hosts Gala on June 4th to raise awareness for language disorder affecting over 2 million in US.

news.summary: Fiberon, based in Maumee, Ohio, has been acknowledged for their sustainable manufacturing efforts with a Green GOOD DESIGN® Award for their Concordia polyethylene (PE) composite decking collection named Astir. The company's dedication to eco-friendly practices has been highlighted through this recent accomplishment. Kate Haws, the director of brand communications at Fiberon, expressed gratitude for the recognition, stating, "It's an honor to receive this award". Fiberon, established in 1997, prioritizes the production of products that resonate with customers as an ideal option for their families and residences. This recognition serves as a testament to their ongoing commitment to environmentally conscious manufacturing, as demonstrated through their Astir Collection.
news.headline: Fiberon wins Green GOOD DESIGN® Award for Astir Collection of Concordia PE decking. Commitment to sustainability since 1997.

news.summary: Milliken & Company's Borchers brand, a top global provider of advanced coating additives, has launched a new product – Borchi® Dragon Low. This offering promises exceptional drying performance. The unveiling took place on May 29, 2025, in Spartanburg, South Carolina. This demonstrates the brand's commitment to innovation in the industry.
news.headline: Milliken & Company introduces Borchi® Dragon Low VOC catalyst for coating additives with outstanding drying performance.

news.summary: A company specializing in applied safety science, UL Solutions Inc. (NYSE: ULS) from Northbrook, Ill., will be represented by its senior management at various upcoming investor conferences. These include the William Blair 45th Annual Growth Stock Conference on June 3, the Stifel 2025 Boston Cross Sector 1x1 Conference on June 4, and the Baird 2025 Global Consumer, Technology & Services Conference on June 5. Of note, the company's presentation at the William Blair conference is scheduled for 3 PM.
news.headline: UL Solutions Inc. will attend 3 investor conferences in June, including William Blair and Stifel, showcasing their expertise.

news.summary: Guess?, Inc. (NYSE: GES) is set to announce its financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026, concluding on May 3, 2025, on June 5, 2025. A conference call will be held at 4:45 p.m. (ET) on the same day to review the results. The call will be available for live streaming on www.guess.com under the “Investor Relations” section. A replay of the conference will be stored on the site for a duration of 30 days. Guess?, Inc. is involved in the design, marketing, distribution, and licensing of its products.
news.headline: Guess?, Inc. (NYSE: GES) to webcast Q1 fiscal 2026 financial results on June 5, 2025, following May 3, 2025 quarter end.

news.summary: NuScale, located in Corvallis, Oregon, has recently gained design approval from the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission for its enhanced 250 MWt (77 MWe) NuScale Power Modules.
news.headline: US NRC grants design approval to NuScale for uprated 250 MWt (77 MWe) SMR; major milestone achieved.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Pittsburgh, Wesco International (NYSE: WCC) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.45375 per share on all outstanding common stock. This dividend will be paid on June 30, 2025 to shareholders.
news.headline: Wesco International (NYSE: WCC) declares $0.45375 per share dividend, payable June 30, 2025.

news.summary: In Dallas, Invitation Homes Inc. (NYSE: INVH) disclosed that its management team is scheduled to take part in a roundtable discussion at Nareit’s REITweek 2025 Investor Conference on June 3 at 2:30 p.m. ET. A live audio webcast of the session can be accessed on the Investor Relations segment of the Company's website at www.invh.com. Those interested can also catch a replay of the webcast until July 3, 2025.
news.headline: Invitation Homes to join Nareit’s REITweek 2025 Investor Conference on June 3, 2:30 pm Eastern Time. Live webcast available.

news.summary: On Thursday, the stock of Uber experienced a decline of over 5% after reports surfaced that Tesla is gearing up to introduce its own robotaxi service in early June. This development has created a competitive threat for Uber in the autonomous transportation market.
news.headline: Uber stock drops 5% as Tesla plans to launch robotaxi service in early June, as reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.summary: Aramark's price performance is on the rise, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating from 80 to 84. This improvement indicates a positive trend in the company's stock performance.
news.headline: Aramark's stock sees relative strength rating rise from 80 to 84, reflecting improved price performance.

news.summary: Nvidia's stock is poised to play a significant role in a sustained period of market expansion. Analysts are optimistic about the company's potential for growth, with current trends favoring a long-term uptrend. This recent resurgence in Nvidia's stock is seen as a crucial factor in driving an extended period of market success, according to market experts. Investors are closely monitoring Nvidia's performance, as it could be a key player in propelling the market to new heights in the foreseeable future.
news.headline: Nvidia stock's resurgence is pivotal for a potential long-term market growth period, reports Investor's Business Daily.

news.summary: Marvell Technology, a chipmaker, surpassed expectations for its fiscal first quarter and provided a positive outlook for the current period. Despite this, Marvell stock experienced a decline in value following the earnings announcement. The company's performance exceeded estimates, reflecting strong numbers in key financial indicators. This news was shared on a respected financial news platform.
news.headline: Marvell Technology surpasses Q1 estimates, yet stock declines after. Details in Investor's Business Daily.

news.summary: After reporting its third-quarter earnings and revenue late Thursday, Costco stock is now trading close to a buy zone. The company exceeded expectations for both earnings and revenue. However, its same-store sales growth did not meet projections. The wholesaler's performance in the third quarter has attracted investors' attention.
news.headline: Costco's Q3 earnings and revenue beat expectations, but same-store sales growth disappoints, stock near buy zone.

news.summary: Shares of Zscaler rose following the company's report of fiscal Q3 earnings, revenue, and billings that exceeded Wall Street's expectations. The cybersecurity firm's stock surged in response to the news.
news.headline: Zscaler beats Q3 estimates: Earnings, revenue, billings top Wall Street. Stock rises.

news.summary: The stock of NetApp, a company specializing in enterprise data storage, experienced a drop in value during after-hours trading on Thursday following the release of a sales forecast that missed expectations. Despite reporting earnings that surpassed estimates, the company's stock fell due to lower-than-expected guidance. The precise figures on the stock decline and sales forecast were not provided in the rephrased text.
news.headline: NetApp beats earnings estimate but stock falls as sales forecast misses expectations, impacting guidance.

news.summary: In its latest financial report, Costco Wholesale Corp (NASDAQ: COST) disclosed its third-quarter results. The company's revenue for Q3 reached $63.2 billion, surpassing analyst predictions by a slight margin as they had forecasted $63.19 billion. Costco's adjusted earnings for the quarter stood at $4.28 per share, also exceeding analyst expectations of $4.13 per share. Net sales for the third quarter saw an increase of 8% compared to the same period last year. The full details of the report can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Costco Q3 earnings beat estimates with $63.2 billion revenue, $4.28 EPS, and 5.7% comps growth. Membership fee also increased.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Nashville, Tennessee, Amboss, a prominent provider of AI-driven tools for the Bitcoin Lightning Network, introduced Rails, a self-custodial Bitcoin service aimed at increasing asset functionality. Rails is specifically tailored for corporations, custodians, and individuals with substantial wealth.
news.headline: Amboss launches Rails for Bitcoin Lightning Network, a self-custodial service for companies and individuals.Characters: 107

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Jackson, Mississippi, EastGroup Properties, Inc. (NYSE: EGP) shared updates on its recent operations. The CEO, Marshall Loeb, expressed satisfaction with the company's ongoing performance. He highlighted the significance of the recent business activities, emphasizing the positive direction moving forward.
news.headline: EastGroup Properties (NYSE: EGP) announces recent business activity and presentation at Nareit's REITweek. CEO Marshall Loeb pleased with company's progress.

news.summary: Maumee, Ohio-based Therma-Tru® Doors has been honored with the prestigious 2025 Green GOOD DESIGN® award for its dedication to offering sustainable design solutions for homes nationwide. The award, bestowed by The European Centre for Architecture Art Design and Urban Studies and The Chicago Athenaeum Museum of Architecture and Design, recognizes outstanding achievements in sustainable design. The Green GOOD DESIGN award program aims to highlight leading sustainable design initiatives globally. Therma-Tru® Doors' commitment to sustainable design was acknowledged with this accolade, signifying its leadership in the industry. The award underscores the company's excellence in sustainable design practices.
news.headline: Therma-Tru Doors wins Green GOOD DESIGN® Award for energy-efficient options; 99.8% of Therma-Tru fiberglass doors are ENERGY STAR® certified.

news.summary: A U.S.-based LNG company, Excelerate Energy, Inc. (NYSE: EE), declared that Steven Kobos, the President and CEO, is set to engage in a panel discussion on the U.S. LNG forecast and conduct individual investor meetings at the Jefferies Energy Conference in Kiawah Island, South Carolina. The participation dates are scheduled for June 10 to 11, 2025. Excelerate Energy, Inc. specializes in LNG and plays a significant role in the market.
news.headline: Excelerate Energy, Inc. (NYSE: EE) to take part in Jefferies Energy Conference on June 10-11, 2025 in Kiawah Island, SC. President Steven Kobos to discuss U.S. LNG outlook.

news.summary: NGL Energy Partners LP, based in Tulsa, Oklahoma, has released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of fiscal year 2025. The company also provided guidance for fiscal year 2026. No specific numbers were provided in the rephrased content.
news.headline: NGL Energy Partners LP released Q4 & full year 2025 financial results and guidance for fiscal 2026 in Tulsa, Oklahoma.
Civitas Resources, Inc. prices upsized $750M offering of new senior notes maturing in 2033.

news.summary: At the recent Zevra stockholders meeting, Wendy L. Dixon, Ph.D. and Tamara A. Favorito were both re-elected to the company's board of directors. This decision was made by the stockholders and shows continued support for the expertise and leadership these individuals bring to the board. Their re-election emphasizes the confidence the stockholders have in their ability to contribute to the company's success.
news.headline: Zevra announces results of 2025 meeting: Wendy L. Dixon, Ph.D. & Tamara A. Favorito re-elected to Board of Directors.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on May 29, 2025, Fospha introduced its latest research Playbook that highlights YouTube and Demand Gen as crucial factors for achieving scalable and profitable growth this year. The platform emphasizes the importance of these components in helping brands meet the growing demand for efficiency and effectiveness. The playbook provides insights and strategies for leveraging YouTube and Demand Gen, showcasing their impact on driving successful marketing campaigns. It serves as a valuable resource for companies looking to boost their performance, with the aim of capitalizing on these key drivers to achieve significant growth.
news.headline: Fospha study finds YouTube & Demand Gen drive 145% revenue growth for brands. New playbook highlights profit potential.

news.summary: Located in Freiburg, Germany, Black Forest Labs, a prominent AI research lab in Europe, has unveiled FLUX.1 Kontext - a cutting-edge suite of image generation models. This latest release offers advanced in-context generating and editing features. With Kontext, users can effortlessly create, enhance, and refine images using text and visual inputs, eliminating the requirement for intricate editing processes or fine-tuning. FLUX.1 Kontext targets creators, developers, and businesses looking to streamline their image generation workflows.
news.headline: Black Forest Labs unveils FLUX.1 Kontext for image generation and editing without finetuning - aims at creators & enterprises.

news.summary: In the latest update, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 3.8%, which is the lowest it has been in over a decade. This decrease in unemployment has also been accompanied by a rise in job creation, with over 200,000 new jobs added in the last month alone. These positive numbers have been attributed to a strong economy and steady growth in various sectors. Experts are optimistic about the future outlook and the potential for further improvements in the job market.
news.headline: Paysign, Inc. will attend MicroCap Rodeo Spring Conference to present their latest updates and trends.

news.summary: Colgate-Palmolive Company revealed new executive leadership appointments, effective June 16, 2025. Shane Grant, aged 50, will assume the newly established position of Chief Operating Officer, Americas at Colgate-Palmolive, with responsibility for North America and Latin America regions. Grant, known as an esteemed figure in the industry, has consistently delivered impressive outcomes. He will transition from his previous role at Group Danone to take on this new challenge.
news.headline: Colgate-Palmolive appoints Shane Grant as Chief Operating Officer, Americas, starting June 16, 2025. Grant, 50, joins from Group Danone.

news.summary: In Honolulu, Hawaii, Toby Mitchell from Ali'iolani Elementary School has been honored nationally for his groundbreaking classroom techniques that have led to remarkable student performance and elevated standards. The recognition was announced on May 29, 2025. Toby Mitchell's exceptional efforts have earned him accolades from Curriculum Associates.
news.headline: Hawai'i teacher Toby Mitchell recognized as one of Curriculum Associates' 2025 Class of Extraordinary Educators™.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Johnson City, Tennessee, Teddy Laboratory, a subsidiary of Tigermed, announced the signing of a strategic partnership with LabConnect, LLC, a prominent global provider of central laboratory services. The agreement entails collaborating to establish a comprehensive laboratory service system.
news.headline: Teddy Laboratory partners with LabConnect to enhance lab services, marking a new collaboration in the industry.

news.summary: Danaher has recently announced a collaboration with AstraZeneca to expand precision medicine initiatives, which involves advancing AI-driven diagnostics. The partnership intends to establish a platform for prompt research, development, and launch of diagnostic solutions. Danaher's Centers will play a key role in this collaboration.
news.headline: Danaher partners with AstraZeneca to scale precision medicine, focusing on AI-powered diagnostics, aiming for rapid development and commercialization, leading to advancements in precision medicine.

news.summary: The President and CEO of Marriott International, Inc., Anthony Capuano, is set to address the 2025 Morgan Stanley Travel and Leisure Conference on Tuesday, June 3. The event will take place in Bethesda, Md., and Mr. Capuano's speech is scheduled for around this time. Marriott International, Inc. is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol MAR. The conference is expected to attract a significant audience, including investors, industry professionals, and media representatives.
news.headline: Marriott CEO to speak at Morgan Stanley Travel and Leisure Conference on June 3. Details to be webcasted.
